name: Team
label: Team           coordinator + 2 specialists + shared memory + HTTP API
description: A multi-agent team with a coordinator that delegates to research and writing specialists.
readme:
# {{name}}

{{description}}

## Entity tree

```
{{tree}}
```

## Setup

```bash
{{setup}}
```

Add your LLM API key to `.env`, then uncomment the executor imports in each brain entity.

## Run

```bash
pnpm dev
```

## Usage

Give the team a task:

```bash
curl localhost:3000/task -d '{"message": "Research TypeScript and write a blog post"}'
```

entities.description: Agent team with coordinator and specialists
entities.describe: I am the agent team root. I receive tasks via HTTP and delegate them to my coordinator, who orchestrates research and writing specialists.

entities.description: Coordinates the team — delegates research and writing
entities.describe: You are a team coordinator. Break tasks into steps. Use the researcher for finding information and the writer for creating content.

tools.name: plan
tools.description: Plan the next steps for a task

entities.describe: You are a research specialist. Find information and store key findings in memory.

tools.name: research

entities.description: Writes content based on research and instructions
entities.describe: You are a writer. Use memory to find research, then write clear and engaging content.
Shared memory with ${this.entries.length} entries. Use store() to save and search() to find.
